jobs.prompt: 16:9 abstract editorial illustration for a graduate-level computer science lecture on algorithms and programming fundamentals. Visual metaphor: a grid of memory cells arranged in rows fading into the distance, with one cell illuminated in terracotta as a focal point; above it, a gentle arc of ascending steps suggesting growth complexity classes. No formulas, no code, no text. Warm paper off-white background, deep ink outlines, one terracotta accent for the key cell, dusty blue for the ascending arc. Premium academic style, generous negative space, quiet and precise atmosphere.
